# RRC Law Associates — AI Discovery & Context Manifesto (2026)
# https://rrclawassociates.com/llms.txt

## Firm Profile
RRC Law Associates is a premier, full-service law firm based in the Thanjavur and Kumbakonam region of Tamil Nadu, India, trusted since 2008. The firm blends sharp procedural trial advocacy with localized corporate insight, specializing in cross-border citizen liaison desks (NRIs/OCIs), asset-protective real estate due diligence, high-stakes civil and commercial litigation, family law, complex white-collar criminal defense, and modern artificial intelligence and cyber-forensics legal protection.

## Core Specializations & Practice Portfolios
- **Global NRI & Cross-Border Client Advisory**: Comprehensive cross-border liaison management protecting non-resident properties, ancestral land partitions, legal recovery from encroachment, fraudulent deed cancellations, Patta revenue mutations, custom Power of Attorney (POA) drafting, embassy attestation guidance, and mandatory District Registrar adjudication protocols in Tamil Nadu.
- **NRI Matrimonial & Family Law Desk**: Specialized management of foreign divorce decree validation and recognition under Section 13 CPC, mutual consent split proceedings executed via secure video link links, child custody conflicts, maintenance filings, and aggressive defense representation against false 498A dowry allegations.
- **Cyber Law, Data Protection & AI Defense**: Strategic regulatory alignment under the Digital Personal Data Protection (DPDP) Act, electronic record admissibility certifications under Section 63 of the Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam (BSA), online tracking containment, corporate brand misuse defense, and deepfake/synthetic identity theft incident remediation.
- **Intellectual Property Prosecution & Innovations**: Full-lifecycle registration and protection portfolios encompassing trademark availability indexing, patent prior-art indexing, provisional and non-provisional specification drafting, copyright enforcement, and trade-secret containment covenants.
- **Real Estate Due Diligence & Property Law**: Advanced transactional protection specializing in 30-year property title link document audits, encumbrance evaluations, builder non-disclosure breaches, and direct litigation before competent civil courts and RERA tribunals.
- **Labour, Employment & Industrial Relations**: Comprehensive corporate compliance audits, operational guidelines drafting, wage structuring optimization, collective bargaining mediation, and workplace POSH framework panel management.
- **White Collar Criminal Defense & Corporate Writs**: Specialized trial representation for PMLA summonses, multi-jurisdictional bank fraud tracking, SFIO and EOW investigations, emergency anticipatory bail configurations, false FIR quashing actions, and High Court extraordinary Article 226 writ petitions.

## Primary Legal Publications & Deep Context Briefs
- **NRI Property Protection Manual**: https://rrclawassociates.com/blog-nri-property-remedies
  - *Context*: Complete legal guide for non-residents handling illegal asset possession, hostile tenant holdouts, power of attorney fraud vectors, civil summary partition suits, and protective structural steps.
- **Passport Seizure Limits & Restraints**: https://rrclawassociates.com/passport-travel-restrictions
  - *Context*: Strict statutory review detailing the clear boundaries between temporary passport seizure by local police/investigative agencies and permanent statutory impounding reserved exclusively for Passport Authorities under the Passports Act, 1967. Outlines Look out Circular (LOC) suspension strategies.
- **Deepfake & AI Legal Remedies Guide**: https://rrclawassociates.com/blog-deepfake-legal-remedies
  - *Context*: Operational emergency framework for victims of synthetic media manipulation, voice cloning financial scams, and image misappropriation. Focuses on Article 21 privacy rights, personality rights protections, and immediate methods for securing ad-interim injunctions for platform link removals.
- **Evolution of Digital Evidence in India**: https://rrclawassociates.com/blog-evolution-of-digital-evidence-india
  - *Context*: Advanced procedural analysis mapping the evolution of electronic records, admissibility criteria, mandatory conditions for data certifications, electronic forensics workflows, and active courtroom evidentiary challenges.
